steps.title: Interpret the percentage relationship
steps.content:
If 20% of the original marbles were removed, then 80% of the original remained. Since 360 marbles remained, we know:
$$0.8 \times \text{original} = 360$$

steps.title: Find 20% removed using proportions
steps.content:
We don't need to solve for the original. Instead, note that 20 is $\frac{1}{4}$ of 80 (since $\frac{20}{80} = \frac{1}{4}$). This means the marbles removed equal $\frac{1}{4}$ of the marbles remaining:
$$\text{Removed} = \frac{1}{4} \times 360 = 90$$
This matches choice B — B is correct.
